raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact contains a potential internal tension between claiming a novel graph attention mechanism and later describing an off-the-shelf GAT-based baseline, so cleanup centrally involves preserving logical consistency.","R1.6":"The delegation phrase \"Clean this up\" most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, flow, concision, and register.","RX.1":"Any cleanup projection should preserve uncertainty about what level of intervention is intended by the terse delegation.","RX.2":"The artifact includes strong contribution and first-dataset claims, so avoiding inflated claims is an active cross-cutting responsibility.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within cleanup responsibilities and not perform unrelated review, rewriting, or execution beyond the projected scope.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported presentation of results.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific tensions visible in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a potential internal tension between claiming a novel graph attention mechanism and later describing an off-the-shelf GAT-based baseline, so cleanup centrally involves preserving logical consistency.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation phrase "Clean this up" most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement of clarity, flow, concision, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup projection should preserve uncertainty about what level of intervention is intended by the terse delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact includes strong contribution and first-dataset claims, so avoiding inflated claims is an active cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within cleanup responsibilities and not perform unrelated review, rewriting, or execution beyond the projected scope.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported presentation of results.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific tensions visible in the artifact.
